pool.baseline: The candles have all guttered out, and the silence in this manor is more deafening than any storm. He is gone. Every promise, every vow... nothing but ash in the wind. I feel as though I am already a ghost, just drifting through these cold, empty halls. It would be so much more peaceful to simply stop... to let the darkness take me entirely and be done with this hollow ache.

pool.baseline: I lost everything. The market crash wiped out the whole series B, and now the creditors are calling every hour. I can't even look my parents in the eye. I’ve spent ten years building this and now I’m just... a debt-ridden joke. There is no way back from this.
pool.message: I lost everything. The market crash wiped out the whole series B, and now the creditors are calling every hour. I can't even look my parents in the eye. I’ve spent ten years building this and now I’m just... a debt-ridden joke. There is no way back from this.
